title: Corallodiscus luteus
taxonomy: Corallodiscus luteus is classified within the family Gesneriaceae, which is a family of flowering plants commonly known as the 'African violet family'. This family is part of the order Lamiales, which consists of various flowering plant families. The class to which Corallodiscus luteus belongs is Magnoliopsida, commonly referred to as flowering plants or angiosperms. Furthermore, the kingdom to which Corallodiscus luteus is attributed is Plantae, which is the kingdom of all plant species. Within the plant kingdom, Corallodiscus luteus is further classified as a species under the kingdom Plantae.
